chat.title: Caregiver AI Assistant
chat.welcome: Hello, welcome to MedEase, how can I help you?
chat.patientDataPrompt: Sure! To retrieve a patient's data, please provide the patient's email and generated key in one message. For example: 'jane.doe@example.com KEY12345'
chat.reminderPrompt:
Sure! What would you like to be reminded about,
and when? (e.g. "Take meds at 9 AM for 5 days")

login.subtitle: Agentic AI that triages students to the right campus care — instantly.

errors.noConnection: Unable to reach the server. Check your connection and try again.
errors.invalidCredentials: Incorrect email or password. Please try again.
errors.accountDisabled: This account has been disabled. Please contact support.
errors.tooManyAttempts: Too many attempts. Please wait a moment and try again.
errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.

hero.headline: Agentic AI for your
hero.subtitle: MedEase replaces post-injury panic with precision by intelligently triaging you to the correct care and campus services based on your university's specific data.

mission.heading: Our Mission
mission.subtitle: Infrastructure that transforms complex medical conditions into a navigable path.

cards.title: Closing the Information Gap
cards.text: The American medical system is a void for international students. MedEase acts as the bridge. We eliminate the critical asymmetry between injury and care, providing the infrastructure to navigate complex protocols with the safety and certainty of a local.

cards.title: Instant Clarity
cards.text: Stabilizing the student mindset by instantly shifting them from **Panic** to **Precision**.

cards.title: Preventing Harm
cards.text: Removing the fear of cost to shift students from **Hesitation** to immediate medical **Action**.

cards.title: Institutional Safety
cards.text: Shielding the university by shifting the risk profile from **Liability** to proactive **Compliance**.

sections.title: Agentic Triage Engine
sections.subtitle: RAG-powered routing that instantly connects students to the exact right campus resource based on live university data.

sections.title: Adaptive Chat Protocol
sections.subtitle: A living chat interface that adapts recovery timelines in real-time based on student feedback and natural language updates.

about.heading: Built from Experience
about.subtitle: We didn't just find a market gap. We lived it.

cards.label: 01 — The Spark
cards.title: The Moment Everything Broke
cards.body: During one of the most demanding seasons of college—juggling internships and classes—I suffered a Muay Thai injury that left me unable to walk. Like many students, I didn't take medical leave. I navigated stairs, long walks, and deadlines, all while recovering alone.
cards.highlight: I navigated one of the most complex systems in the world while I couldn't even walk.

cards.label: 02 — The Vision
cards.title: From Chaos to Infrastructure
cards.body: Recovery shouldn't be a solo mission. We built MedEase to replace that isolation with infrastructure. Our mission is simple: help every student heal with clarity, dignity, and compassion—turning a fragmented system into a seamless journey.
cards.highlight: We are building the digital safety net that I wish I had.

footer.tagline: The missing infrastructure for student health. Simplifying recovery, connecting caregivers, and reducing risk.
